name: ysainson
description: Yann's personal plugin marketplace: the VIBE build pipeline. A vibe-coding surface (one command, fast) over a disciplined core - test-first builds, model-tiered doers, mandatory review of every diff, and an independent fresh-context verifier. The VIBE core plus per-stack overlays, updated from one place.

plugins.name: vibe
plugins.description: Disciplined, model-adaptive build pipeline disguised as vibe coding: idea -> brief -> scaffold -> test-first build, where every diff is reviewed and a fresh-context verifier signs off before anything is called done. It looks like vibe coding; it's the opposite.

plugins.name: vibe-swift
plugins.description: VIBE overlay for Swift / macOS: concurrency, testability, and signing/notarization guardian agents, plus the Swift scaffold knowledge /vibe:setup uses. Depends on the re-exported swiftui-expert and swift-testing-expert skills.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Re-exported and pinned: obra/superpowers - the agentic SDLC phase engine the VIBE conduct skill wraps (brainstorming, writing-plans, subagent-driven-development, test-driven-development, code review, finishing-a-development-branch).

plugins.name: swiftui-expert
plugins.description: Re-exported and pinned: AvdLee/SwiftUI-Agent-Skill - expert SwiftUI guidance for state, composition, performance, and Liquid Glass. A vibe-swift dependency.

plugins.name: swift-testing-expert
plugins.description: Re-exported and pinned: AvdLee/Swift-Testing-Agent-Skill - expert Swift Testing guidance (#expect/#require, traits, parameterization, XCTest migration). A vibe-swift dependency.
